    Aashna is slaying her day-to-night with statement gold & diamond jewellery

    You can agree that an outfit is just incomplete without the right accessories! Now you can easily choose from 10,000+ designs and embrace timeless elegance with a modern twist, with Tanishq’s GlamDays!
    From everyday elegance to contemporary chic, you can discover your summer style!

    Khushi's jewellery guide to styling the same outfit differently

    Styling 3 looks on one base becomes so much easier with the perfect jewelry! I’ve paired gold pieces because I think it looks super chic even with everyday wear.
    And what better place to explore these than Tanishq GlamDays that has over 10,000 modern gold designs to choose from!✨✨

    What's Stealing the Spotlight

    Trending Treasures You Need

    Glam Gold


    Tanishq GlamDays brings to you a modern take on Daily wear Gold jewellery, inspired by designs from around the world. A range of contemporary pieces that can add a touch of modernity in your everyday style, be it to office, running errands or even a beautiful ethnic ensemble.

    Discover Items

    Modern Polki


    A jewellery marvel like Polki is an evergreen style running since centuries and still as captivating as ever. Tanishq's Polki collection is here to break the stereotype of it being a heavy occasion or wedding wear jewellery, but something that can even jell with minimal ensembles on a more regular basis. Elevate your everyday look with a touch of royalty across get-togethers or office hours.

    Discover Items

    Gemstones


    Minimalistic coloured stones such as chic white pearls, bold emerald hues, classic ruby reds or soft pink stones, have now become staples even with office attires to casual evening dinners. They perfectly complement the Monochrome styling trend as well. A wide variety of such exquisite coloured stone jewellery awaits you at Tanishq!

    Discover Items

    Featured Collection

    Glam Day, Every Day: Tanishq’s Take On Daily Wear Gold Jewellery

    At Tanishq, we have a simple belief: elegance should never be limited to just special occasions. That’s why we’re excited to unveil our newest creation, GlamDays – a destination for daily wear jewellery infusing a touch of luxury into your daily routine with statement gold and diamond jewellery, never seen in India so far.
